svg.content: <mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Gemini" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="rainfall-prediction-system" name="Architecture"> <mxGraphModel dx="4266" dy="2631" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1170" pageHeight="827" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="QmbZmRvrDJgTIeYi67YD-13" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="730" width="1170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="main_title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" value="<b><font style="font-size: 24px;">Rainfall Prediction System</font></b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="400" x="385" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="col1_bg" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#000000;strokeWidth=2;arcSize=4;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="580" width="340" x="20" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="col1_header" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#A4A4A4;fontColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=default;fontSize=15;" value="<b><font style="font-size: 18px;">1. Data Engineering &amp;<br>Model Development</font></b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="300" x="40" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c1_s1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#000000;fillColor=none;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="<font style="font-size: 14px;"><b>Remote Data Storage</b><br></font><ul><li><font size="3">Satellite Data (HDF5 format)</font></li><li><font size="3">Access via IP (Distributed Storage)</font></li></ul>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="300" x="40" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c1_s2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#000000;fillColor=none;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="<font style="font-size: 14px;"><b>Data Processing</b><br></font><ul><li><font size="3">Feature extraction (e.g., IMC, LST)</font></li><li><font size="3">Grid mapping (grid_id)</font></li><li><font size="3">Aggregation and cleaning</font></li><li><font size="3">Imputation</font></li></ul>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="300" x="40" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c1_s3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#000000;fillColor=none;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="<font style="font-size: 14px;"><b>Processed Storage</b><br></font><ul><li><font 15px;">Output: Trained Model</font></li></ul>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="210" x="40" y="540" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="artifact" parent="1"
